_note: Operator-filled AFTER each arm's Workflow run. tokens_delta = tokens_end - tokens_start from that arm's persisted outputs/<arm>.json (harness.workflow.js's budget.spent() sample). This is a PER-ARM AGGREGATE over the whole arm run (72 cells), not a per-cell figure -- see README 'Cost/time capture'. budget.spent()'s exact return shape is unverified in this repo (no prior harness used it); if it returns a structured object rather than a number, record the total/summed field here and note the field name in '_shape'.
